name_en: 【Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original Enhanced Version】
name_cn:
【Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original Enhanced Version】
Model M475 Black, M4739 Beige, M473 Apricot Top-tier Original. This Loop Hobo bag is crafted from soft Monogram Empreinte calfskin to create a trendy crescent shape that fits the body, making it an ideal choice for city travel. A removable zip pocket can also be used separately. With a chain or adjustable shoulder strap, explore more carrying ways.
3. x . x . cm (L x H x W)
	•	Monogram Emprente embossed calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Removable zip pocket
	•	Zip closure
	•	Shoulder strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 3. cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 5. cm
	•	Chain: Removable
